Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective on the date of the assessment of annual permit fees in accordance with (as certified to Congress by the Secretary of Agriculture), see . The tiered fee schedule set out in was implemented effective .section 6214(f) of this titlesection 6214(k) of this titlesection 6214(f) of this titleJan. 1, 2016

Short Title, , , which provided that title VI of , enacting this chapter, could be cited as the “Cabin User Fee Fairness Act of 2000”, was repealed by , , , effective on the date of the assessment of annual permit fees in accordance with (as certified to Congress by the Secretary of Agriculture).Pub.
